name: UnShrimp
description: Sit up. Shrimp proud. Local webcam posture coach with calibration and on-device feedback—no video uploaded.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com
